tagline: Workspace level Genie One customization: Workspace admins can now customize Genie One at the workspace level.
what_it_does: Workspace level Genie One customization: Workspace admins can now customize Genie One at the workspace level. Under workspace settings, admins can configure colors, a logo, a markdown welcome message, and pinned content. Certified object prioritization: Chat in Genie One now acknowledges and prioritizes certified objects.
why_it_matters: Genie Ontology (Public Preview): Genie One now automatically builds and maintains a map of your business by extracting and ranking knowledge from sources such as dashboards, notebooks, and pipelines, improving response accuracy and reducing latency.
key_takeaway: Workspace level Genie One customization: Workspace admins can now customize Genie One at the workspace level.
